title: Systems Administrator
description: Anduril is looking for a Systems Administrator to support our Detroit operations in defense technology. You'll manage critical systems in a hybrid environment, ensuring reliability and security across our infrastructure. Help advance technology that protects national security.
responsibilities: Deploy, configure, and maintain Windows and Linux servers
Manage active directory, user accounts, and access controls
Monitor system performance and implement capacity planning improvements
Implement and maintain security patches and system hardening standards
Troubleshoot infrastructure issues and provide technical support
Document system configurations and maintain disaster recovery procedures

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field; or equivalent hands-on experience
skills: Windows Server and Active Directory administration
Knowledge of security best practices and compliance
